mapper.update: MERGE INTO TBL_CURRENCY c USING ( SELECT #{currencyId} AS Currency_ID, #{userNo} AS User_No, #{changeAmount} AS Change_Amount FROM DUAL ) src ON ( c.Currency_ID = src.Currency_ID AND c.User_No = src.User_No ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET c.Total_Amount = c.Total_Amount + src.Change_Amount WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (Currency_ID, User_No, Total_Amount) VALUES (src.Currency_ID, src.User_No, src.Change_Amount)

UPDATE TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY SET VOLUN_ACT_TITLE = #{volunActTitle}, VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_BEGIN = #{volunActRecruBegin}, VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_END = #{volunActRecruEnd}, VOLUN_ACT_PROC_BEGIN = #{volunActProcBegin}, VOLUN_ACT_PROC_END = #{volunActProcEnd}, VOLUN_ACT_POINT = #{volunActPoint}, VOLUN_ACT_BEGIN_TIME = #{volunActBeginTime}, VOLUN_ACT_END_TIME = #{volunActEndTime}, VOLUN_ACT_ACT_TYPE = #{volunActActType}, VOLUN_ACT_AGE_GROUP = #{volunActAgeGroup}, VOLUN_ACT_ADDRESS = #{volunActAddress}, VOLUN_ACT_ADDRESS_DETAIL = #{volunActAddressDetail}, VOLUN_ACT_POSTNUM = #{volunActPostnum}, VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_MAX_COUNT = #{volunActRecruMaxCount}, VOLUN_ACT_DETAIL = #{volunActDetail} WHERE VOLUN_ACT_NO = #{volunActNo}
mapper.select: SELECT A.VOLUN_ACT_NO AS volunActNo, A.USER_NO AS userNo, U.USER_NAME AS userName, U.USER_BIRTH AS userBirth, TO_CHAR(A.VOLUNACT_APPLYDATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS volunActApplyDate, A.VOLUNACT_APPLYSTATUS AS volunActApplyStatus, A.VOLUNACT_ATTENDANCE AS volunActAttendance FROM TBL_VOLUN_APPLY A JOIN TBL_USER U ON A.USER_NO = U.USER_NO WHERE A.VOLUN_ACT_NO = #{volunActNo} ORDER BY A.VOLUNACT_APPLYDATE DESC

SELECT VOLUN_ACT_NO, VOLUN_ACT_TITLE, TO_CHAR(VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_BEGIN, 'YYYY-MM-DD')as VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_BEGIN, TO_CHAR(VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_END, 'YYYY-MM-DD')as VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_END, TO_CHAR(VOLUN_ACT_PROC_BEGIN, 'YYYY-MM-DD')as VOLUN_ACT_PROC_BEGIN, TO_CHAR(VOLUN_ACT_PROC_END, 'YYYY-MM-DD')as VOLUN_ACT_PROC_END, VOLUN_ACT_POINT, VOLUN_ACT_BEGIN_TIME, VOLUN_ACT_END_TIME, VOLUN_ACT_ACT_TYPE, VOLUN_ACT_AGE_GROUP, VOLUN_ACT_ORGAN_NO, VOLUN_ACT_ADDRESS, VOLUN_ACT_ADDRESS_DETAIL, VOLUN_ACT_POSTNUM, VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_MAX_COUNT, VOLUN_ACT_DETAIL, CASE WHEN SYSDATE < VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_BEGIN THEN '모집예정' WHEN SYSDATE < VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_END + 1 THEN '모집중' ELSE '모집마감' END AS RECRU_STATUS FROM TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY WHERE VOLUN_ACT_NO = #{volunActNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY ( VOLUN_ACT_NO, VOLUN_ACT_TITLE, VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_BEGIN, VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_END, VOLUN_ACT_PROC_BEGIN, VOLUN_ACT_PROC_END, VOLUN_ACT_POINT, VOLUN_ACT_BEGIN_TIME, VOLUN_ACT_END_TIME, VOLUN_ACT_ACT_TYPE, VOLUN_ACT_AGE_GROUP, VOLUN_ACT_ORGAN_NO, VOLUN_ACT_ADDRESS, VOLUN_ACT_ADDRESS_DETAIL, VOLUN_ACT_POSTNUM, VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_MAX_COUNT, VOLUN_ACT_DETAIL ) VALUES ( SEQ_TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY.NEXTVAL, #{volunActTitle}, #{volunActRecruBegin}, #{volunActRecruEnd}, #{volunActProcBegin}, #{volunActProcEnd}, #{volunActPoint}, #{volunActBeginTime}, #{volunActEndTime}, #{volunActActType}, #{volunActAgeGroup}, #{volunActOrganNo}, #{volunActAddress}, '-', '000000', #{volunActRecruMaxCount}, #{volunActDetail} )
